name: CXJ GROUP CO., Ltd
business: CXJ Group is an automobile aftermarket products wholesaler and auto detailing store consultancy company. It sells motor oil, auto parts, and exhaust cleaners, and provides brand name licensing and consultancy services to auto detailing store owners. Its products are sold through franchise stores and to 4S repair shops.

exposures.sentence: We are an automobile aftermarket products wholesaler, as well as an auto detailing store consultancy company.
Our customer will use our brand name Chejiangling / Teenage Hero Car for their auto detailing stores.
We have also developed an enterprise resource planning system (ERP) for our customers.
